category_sources: source_facts.description identifies oxfmt as a high-performance formatting tool for JavaScript and TypeScript; official Oxc docs describe Oxfmt as a high-performance formatter for the JavaScript ecosystem.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is oxfmt; official Oxc documentation titles the formatter Oxfmt.
docs_sources: Official Oxc documentation has dedicated Oxfmt usage and CLI pages; official Oxc repository README documents formatting via oxfmt.
repo_sources: Official Oxc GitHub repository documents Oxfmt as part of the Oxc toolchain; source_facts.homepage is the official Oxc site.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names JavaScript and TypeScript formatting; official Oxfmt docs describe Prettier-compatible formatting and Rust/Oxc implementation.
